subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and firm in heart and soul! In these days 'Abdu'l-Bahá is bound for America and is most [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای راسخ پیمان و ثابت دل و جان عبدالبهاء در این روزها عازم امریکاست و نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment
